title: IARI Project Technical Support- I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
short_info: ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute (IARI) Project Technical Support-I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IARI. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IARI Project Technical Support-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: As per the guidelines of funding agency

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate degree in Food Technology/ Dairy Technology/ Dairy Chemistry/ Food Chemistry/ Food Science and Technology/ Food Science and Nutrition/ Biochemistry; and allied disciplines with one year experience in relevant subject.
qualification.details: Three years Graduate degree in Food Technology/ Dairy Technology/ Dairy Chemistry/ Food Chemistry/ Food Science and Technology/ Food Science and Nutrition/ Biochemistry; and allied disciplines. One year experience in relevant subject.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 18000/- per month + 30% HRA (= Rs. 23400/- per month) for I & II year, with 5% increment on initial emoluments after every two years, subject to performance review.
salary_details.details: Rs. 18000/- per month + 30% HRA (= Rs. 23400/- per month) for I & II year, with 5% increment on initial emoluments after every two years, subject to performance review.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the IARI recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the IARI recruitment is Project Technical Support- I. This is a project-based role within the research field.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by IARI?
faq.answer: IARI has announced a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Technical Support- I position. This is a single opening for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Graduate degree in Food Technology/ Dairy Technology/ Dairy Chemistry/ Food Chemistry/ Food Science and Technology/ Food Science and Nutrition/ Biochemistry; and allied disciplines, along with one year of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support- I role?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 18000/- per month plus 30% HRA, totaling Rs. 23400/- per month for the first two years, with increments thereafter.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date to submit the soft copy of the application?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the soft copy of the application via email is 08 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address by this date.

faq.question: Q6. When and where is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 10 June 2026 at the Division of Food Science and Post Harvest Technology, ICAR-IARI, Pusa Campus, New Delhi 110 012, at 10:00 AM sharp.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates are required to attend the interview in person with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age limit specified for the candidates?
faq.answer: The age limit for the candidates is as per the guidelines of the funding agency. Specific age details should be confirmed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry their Bio-data, attested copies of 10th, 12th, Under-graduation, and other certificates, along with an attested recent passport-size photograph.

faq.question: Q10. What is the desirable experience for this role?
faq.answer: Desirable experience includes proficiency in novel product development, biochemical techniques, and bio-statistics, which can enhance a candidate's application.
